title: Origins: Haeres
description: An origin that has dominion over life and death. However, it seems to favor death more...
body:
# 🩸 Haeres _(ɛɾɛs)_ 🩸
**Impact Level** 🟡🟡⚪

### What is this?

This mod / datapack adds the **Haeres** origin, something beyond our comprehension.
It is a more combat-oriented origin, mixed with a few interesting gimmicks.

### Powers

---

> **Form** ❤️
> - You are something, something never seen before. Thus, the universe doesn't know what to do with you, leaving you with an interesting form. 👤
> - You are a dark silhouette, with red particles emitting from your feet. ♨️
> - You have 2 less hearts. 💔

> **Not Favored** ❤️
> - Undead mobs do more damage to you than normal, and you are unable to do as much damage to them. They know your ways of life. They despise it.

> **Apparition** _(Primary)_ 🌟
> - You are able to fly for 5 seconds, like the gust in the wind.
> - You do not take fall damage.

> **Lunge** _(Secondary)_ 🗡️
> - You are able to lunge at mobs, stunning them and scratching them.
> - This has a 30% chance to backfire and hurt you instead.

> **Intrusion** 🌟
> - When your meta-physical form dies, you return to your soul form.
> - You are able to take the place of any entity _(right click on them)_, as long as they aren't wearing anything in their chest slot.
> - Don't feel too comfortable though, you only have 5 seconds to take the place of a mob or you die.
> - This also has a 30% chance of failing, sending you into the _purgatory dimension._ Where you have the option to wait 10 minutes to return to the overworld, or simply kill yourself in the purgatory _(using sneak + primary)_, losing all your items in the process.

---

### Notes from the author

This is a very interesting Origin that can easily be expanded upon, which I will likely do along the way! All of you should DEFINITELY check out the effects in-game as they are super nice to look at as well. Have fun! <3 ^_^
